parameters.query:
WITH input_data AS (
  SELECT
    {{ $json.user_id }}::BIGINT AS user_id,
    {{ $json.chat_id }}::BIGINT AS chat_id,
    LOWER(TRIM('{{ String($json.search_query || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}')) AS q
),

settings AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE(
      (
        SELECT (value #>> '{}')::INTEGER
        FROM gnote.app_settings
        WHERE key = 'search.max_results_limit'
      ),
      100
    ) AS max_results_limit
),

-- 1. Format the search input into a valid tsquery payload by connecting tokens with '&'
prepared_query AS (
  SELECT 
    regexp_replace(q, '\s+', ' & ', 'g') AS ts_q
  FROM input_data
),

-- 2. Leverage the GIN-indexed fts_vector table directly for instant semantic-text matches
matched_metadata AS (
  SELECT 
    meta.id AS meta_id,
    meta.message_id AS meta_msg_id,
    meta.message_uuid AS meta_msg_uuid,
    meta.summary AS ai_summary,
    meta.category AS ai_category,
    meta.language AS ai_language,
    meta.keywords AS ai_keywords,
    meta.ai_content AS ai_content,
    ts_rank(meta.fts_vector, to_tsquery('simple', (SELECT ts_q FROM prepared_query))) AS rank_score
  FROM gnote.message_ai_metadata meta
  WHERE meta.user_id = (SELECT user_id FROM input_data)
    AND COALESCE(meta.source_status, 'attached') <> 'deleted'
    AND meta.fts_vector @@ to_tsquery('simple', (SELECT ts_q FROM prepared_query))
),

-- 3. Hydrate the fast full-text match rows with actual Telegram layout messages parameters
messages_base AS (
  SELECT
    m.id AS message_id,
    m.id AS id,
    m.user_id,
    (SELECT chat_id FROM input_data) AS chat_id,
    m.topic_id,
    t.title AS topic_title,
    m.message_uuid,
    m.content,
    m.created_at,
    m.message_type,
    m.file_id,
    m.file_unique_id,
    m.file_name,
    m.mime_type,
    m.caption,
    m.telegram_file_path,
    m.file_url,
    m.latitude,
    m.longitude,
    m.location_title,
    m.location_address,
    m.maps_url,
    mm.ai_summary,
    mm.ai_category,
    mm.ai_language,
    mm.ai_keywords,
    mm.ai_content,
    -- Normalize ranking score into an integer for compatible scaling with n8n Code layers
    (mm.rank_score * 100)::INTEGER AS relevance_score
  FROM gnote.messages m
  INNER JOIN matched_metadata mm 
     ON (mm.meta_msg_id = m.id OR mm.meta_msg_uuid = m.message_uuid)
  LEFT JOIN gnote.topics t
    ON t.id = m.topic_id AND t.user_id = m.user_id
  WHERE m.user_id = (SELECT user_id FROM input_data)
    AND m.deleted_at IS NULL
),

ranked AS (
  SELECT
    *,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY relevance_score DESC, created_at DESC, message_id DESC) AS result_number,
    COUNT(*) OVER () AS total_results
  FROM messages_base
)

SELECT
  chat_id,
  user_id,
  message_id,
  id,
  topic_id,
  topic_title,
  result_number,
  total_results,
  relevance_score,
  (SELECT q FROM input_data) AS search_query,
  message_uuid,
  content,
  created_at,
  message_type,
  file_id,
  file_unique_id,
  file_name,
  mime_type,
  caption,
  telegram_file_path,
  file_url,
  latitude,
  longitude,
  location_title,
  location_address,
  maps_url,
  ai_summary,
  ai_category,
  ai_language,
  ai_keywords,
  ai_content,
  CASE
    WHEN message_type = 'photo' THEN 'photo'
    WHEN message_type IN ('document', 'file', 'audio', 'voice', 'video', 'video_note') THEN 'file'
    WHEN latitude IS NOT NULL AND longitude IS NOT NULL THEN 'location'
    ELSE 'text'
  END AS result_action,
  COALESCE(
    NULLIF(file_name, ''),
    NULLIF(caption, ''),
    NULLIF(content, ''),
    NULLIF(location_title, ''),
    NULLIF(location_address, ''),
    NULLIF(maps_url, ''),
    NULLIF(ai_summary, ''),
    'Message'
  ) AS display_text
FROM ranked
ORDER BY result_number
LIMIT (SELECT max_results_limit FROM settings);

nodes.name: Return search rows to main workflow

main.node: Return search rows to main workflow
